change: TF-IDF char n-gram nearest-answer retrieval
reason: Establishes a complete local CPU baseline and valid submission workflow
insight: Full local run completed without GPU; use as reproducible baseline before neural experiments

change: Restrict retrieval candidates to matching subset/language-domain
reason: Test whether language/domain gating improves nearest-answer retrieval
insight: Subset gating reduced validation proxy score; keep global retrieval as current best local baseline

change: Switch retrieval to raw character 2-4 n-grams with sublinear TF and min_df=2
reason: Validation sweep over 120 TF-IDF candidates found shorter raw character n-grams perform best
insight: Current best local CPU baseline; submission format validated with 2618 test rows

change: Weighted voting ensemble over top TF-IDF retrieval variants
reason: Test whether agreement between high-performing retrievers improves answer selection
insight: Ensemble scored slightly below single best char24 config; keep local_retrieval_char24 as current best

change: Validation-only sweep over max-word and first-sentence trimming
reason: Test whether long retrieved answers are hurting ROUGE and should be shortened
insight: Best trim rule max_words=300 still underperformed no trimming at 0.439064; keep full retrieved answers

change: Validation-only top-5 candidate reranking with answer-length penalties
reason: Test whether nearest answer should be replaced by length-calibrated alternatives
insight: Length-penalized reranking underperformed current best; top cosine similarity remains strongest local selector

change: Raw character 1-3 n-gram retrieval with min_df=5 and sublinear TF
reason: Extended local sweep over 48 candidates showed shorter character grams improve validation proxy
insight: New best local CPU retrieval candidate; 100k and 200k feature caps tied so 100k was kept for efficiency

change: Subset-specific vectorizer selection over a global retrieval bank
reason: Use validation subset deltas to route English Ghana/Kenya/Uganda through char13 and other subsets through char24
insight: New best local candidate; subset-specific config switching helped without restricting retrieval candidates

change: Per-subset routing table selected from 12 retrieval candidates
reason: Choose the highest-scoring vectorizer per validation subset while keeping a global answer bank
insight: New best local candidate; gains came from char14 for Akan/Luganda char25 for English Ethiopia and char13 for English Kenya/Uganda/Ghana

change: Latent semantic analysis over TF-IDF question vectors
reason: Test whether truncated SVD semantic retrieval improves beyond lexical TF-IDF
insight: LSA underperformed the lexical subset selector; move to stronger neural retrieval or generation instead

change: TF-IDF top-10 candidate retrieval reranked by MiniLM multilingual sentence embeddings
reason: Use lexical retrieval for recall and semantic similarity for final candidate selection
insight: New best local candidate; semantic weight 0.3 improved validation while direct MiniLM retrieval underperformed

change: Per-subset semantic rerank weights for TF-IDF top-10 candidates
reason: Adapt neural rerank strength by validation subset instead of using one global weight
insight: New best local candidate; English Kenya favored pure MiniLM among candidates while Swahili favored lexical-only ranking

change: MPNet multilingual embedding reranker with per-subset semantic weights
reason: Test whether a stronger multilingual sentence encoder improves TF-IDF top-10 reranking
insight: New best local candidate; MPNet improved English Uganda Swahili and Luganda reranking over MiniLM

change: Restrict weak-language rerank candidates to matching subset
reason: Test whether cross-language/global retrieval errors explain weak Akan Amharic and English Ghana validation scores
insight: Same-subset routing slightly helped Amharic but hurt Akan and English Ghana; keep global answer bank for the best candidate

change: Dynamic per-subset sweep over MPNet top-k and semantic blend weights
reason: Tune rerank hyperparameters from validation results instead of using fixed global settings
insight: Small validation gain came from increasing English Ghana semantic weight to 0.6; weak Amharic and Akan need a stronger retrieval or generation strategy

change: E5 multilingual embedding reranker with query and passage prefixes
reason: Test whether E5 embeddings improve low-resource semantic reranking over MPNet
insight: E5 underperformed overall but improved English Kenya and Swahili Kenya; use it selectively rather than globally

change: Subset-level blend using MPNet base predictions and E5 overrides for English Kenya and Swahili Kenya
reason: Exploit validation evidence that different encoders win on different language subsets
insight: New best local candidate; dynamic model selection by subset improved English Kenya to 0.740854 and Swahili Kenya to 0.643527

change: Subset-specific max-word postprocessing on the MPNet plus E5 blend
reason: Reduce overly long retrieved answers only where validation shows ROUGE gains
insight: New best local candidate; trimming Akan and English Ghana to 120 words and English Ethiopia to 60 words improved validation without changing other subsets

change: AfriTeVa base LoRA fine-tuning on Akan Ghana Amharic Ethiopia and English Ghana weak subsets
reason: Test whether a multilingual African transformer generator can beat retrieval on weak low-resource subsets
insight: Training converged to eval_loss 4.101 but generated answers underperformed retrieval on every targeted subset; do not merge and continue with retrieval/reranking improvements

change: MPNet reranker over a union of five TF-IDF candidate generators
reason: Improve candidate recall before semantic reranking by combining tuned char and char_wb vectorizer views
insight: Union-only run underperformed the current best but improved English Ghana English Kenya and English Uganda; use only those subset overrides

change: Selective blend of trimmed MPNet+E5 baseline with MPNet union overrides for English Ghana Kenya and Uganda
reason: Exploit subset-level validation gains from the union reranker while preserving stronger existing predictions elsewhere
insight: New best local candidate; selective override improved weighted ROUGE from 0.480585 to 0.483254 with valid 2618-row submission

change: MPNet reranker over a wider union of five TF-IDF candidate generators
reason: Test whether a larger candidate pool improves the same positive override subsets
insight: Wide union remained below the current full blend but further improved English Ghana English Kenya and English Uganda versus the narrow union

change: Selective blend of trimmed MPNet+E5 baseline with wide MPNet union overrides for English Ghana Kenya and Uganda
reason: Use wider union only where validation improved while preserving all stronger baseline subsets
insight: New best local candidate; wider override improved weighted ROUGE from 0.483254 to 0.485417 with valid 2618-row submission

change: MPNet reranker over an extra-wide union of five TF-IDF candidate generators
reason: Check whether expanding the rerank pool still helps positive English subsets or starts overfitting
insight: Extra-wide union remained below the full blend but improved English Ghana English Kenya and English Uganda again

change: Selective blend of trimmed MPNet+E5 baseline with extra-wide MPNet union overrides for English Ghana Kenya and Uganda
reason: Use extra-wide union only on subsets with validation gains while preserving stronger baseline predictions elsewhere
insight: New best local candidate; extra-wide overrides improved weighted ROUGE from 0.485417 to 0.488295 with valid 2618-row submission

change: MPNet reranker over a very wide union of five TF-IDF candidate generators
reason: Test whether English override subsets keep benefiting from a larger rerank pool
insight: Very-wide union remained globally below the full blend but improved English Ghana English Kenya and English Uganda versus 30/120

change: Selective blend of trimmed MPNet+E5 baseline with very-wide MPNet union overrides for English Ghana Kenya and Uganda
reason: Keep widening only on subsets with validation gains while preserving stronger baseline predictions elsewhere
insight: New best local candidate; very-wide overrides improved weighted ROUGE from 0.488295 to 0.488972 with valid 2618-row submission

change: Subset-specific input plus retrieval hybrid on weak Akan Amharic and English Ghana rows
reason: Recover reference overlap for generated weak-language answers where the source question contains important target terms missing from retrieval output
insight: New best local candidate; hybrid raised Akan to 0.357040 Amharic to 0.048874 and English Ghana to 0.334456 while preserving all strong subset predictions
